function solve(grid: number[][], k: number): number {
    const m = grid.length;
    const n = grid[0].length;

    // Precompute teleportList
    const teleportList: number[][][] = new Array(m).fill(0).map(() => new Array(n).fill(0).map(() => []));
    for (let i = 0; i < m; i++) {
        for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
            for (let x = 0; x < m; x++) {
                for (let y = 0; y < n; y++) {
                    if (grid[x][y] <= grid[i][j]) {
                        teleportList[i][j].push([x, y]);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // Initialize distance array
    const dist = new Array(m).fill(0).map(() => new Array(n).fill(0).map(() => new Array(k+1).fill(Infinity)));
    dist[0][0][0] = 0;

    // Priority queue: min-heap
    const heap: [number, number, number, number][] = [];
    heap.push([0, 0, 0, 0]);

    // Directions for regular moves: right and down
    const directions = [[0, 1], [1, 0]];

    while (heap.length > 0) {
        // Pop the state with the smallest cost
        heap.sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]);
        const [cost, i, j, t] = heap.shift() as [number, number, number, number];

        // Check if current cell is destination
        if (i === m - 1 && j === n - 1) {
            return cost;
        }

        // Process regular moves
        for (const [dx, dy] of directions) {
            const ni = i + dx;
            const nj = j + dy;
            if (ni >= 0 && ni < m && nj >= 0 && nj < n) {
                const newCost = cost + grid[ni][nj];
                if (newCost < dist[ni][nj][t]) {
                    dist[ni][nj][t] = newCost;
                    heap.push([newCost, ni, nj, t]);
                }
            }
        }

        // Process teleport moves
        if (t < k) {
            for (const [x, y] of teleportList[i][j]) {
                const new_t = t + 1;
                if (cost < dist[x][y][new_t]) {
                    dist[x][y][new_t] = cost;
                    heap.push([cost, x, y, new_t]);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // If not found (should not happen)
    return -1;
}
